title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters
summary: On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. title: Decoupled DiLoCo: A new frontier for resilient, distributed AI training

title: 10 Things That Matter in AI Right Now

summary: When ChatGPT launched as an experimental prototype in late 2022, OpenAI’s chatbot became an everyday everything app for hundreds of millions of people. title: Supercharged scams
summary: When ChatGPT was released to the public in late 2022, it opened people’s eyes to how easily generative AI could churn out vast amounts of human-seeming text from simple prompts. This quickly caught the attention of criminals, who soon began using large language models to produce malicious emails—both the untargeted spam kind and more sophisticated,…
